'''âv-w-p''' ('''kavawap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lump|lump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lump|lump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-w-p
|-
! Lemma
| kavawap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivawap|thivawap]] || [[word:jivawap|jivawap]] || [[word:shivawap|shivawap]] || [[word:kivawap|kivawap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvawap|thuthuvawap]] || [[word:jujuvawap|jujuvawap]] || [[word:shushuvawap|shushuvawap]] || [[word:kukuvawap|kukuvawap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvawap|thuvawap]] || [[word:juvawap|juvawap]] || [[word:shuvawap|shuvawap]] || [[word:kuvawap|kuvawap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvawap|thuvawap]] || [[word:juvawap|juvawap]] || [[word:shuvawap|shuvawap]] || [[word:kuvawap|kuvawap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevawap|thevawap]] || [[word:jevawap|jevawap]] || [[word:shevawap|shevawap]] || [[word:kevawap|kevawap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovawap|thothovawap]] || [[word:jojovawap|jojovawap]] || [[word:shoshovawap|shoshovawap]] || [[word:kokovawap|kokovawap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovawap|thovawap]] || [[word:jovawap|jovawap]] || [[word:shovawap|shovawap]] || [[word:kovawap|kovawap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovawap|thovawap]] || [[word:jovawap|jovawap]] || [[word:shovawap|shovawap]] || [[word:kovawap|kovawap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvawap|thĂŠvawap]] || [[word:jĂŠvawap|jĂŠvawap]] || [[word:shĂŠvawap|shĂŠvawap]] || [[word:kĂŠvawap|kĂŠvawap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavawap|thathavawap]] || [[word:jajavawap|jajavawap]] || [[word:shashavawap|shashavawap]] || [[word:kakavawap|kakavawap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavawap|thavawap]] || [[word:javawap|javawap]] || [[word:shavawap|shavawap]] || [[word:kavawap|kavawap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavawap|thavawap]] || [[word:javawap|javawap]] || [[word:shavawap|shavawap]] || [[word:kavawap|kavawap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavawap|shavawap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavawap|goshavawap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavawap|gokishavawap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavawapnĂŒ|shavawapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavawapnknĂŒ|goshavawapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawapnĂŒ|gokishavawapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavawapshĂ«|shavawapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavawapnkshĂ«|goshavawapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavawapshĂ«|gokishavawapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawapro|shavawapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawapnkro|goshavawapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawapro|gokishavawapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawapmu|shavawapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawapnkmu|goshavawapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawapmu|gokishavawapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavawapsher|shavawapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavawapnksher|goshavawapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavawapsher|gokishavawapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavawapng|shavawapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavawapnkng|goshavawapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavawapng|gokishavawapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavawapya|shavawapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavawapnkya|goshavawapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavawapya|gokishavawapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavawapyam|shavawapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavawapnkyam|goshavawapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavawapyam|gokishavawapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavawapnĂŒshĂ«|shavawapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavawapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavawapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavawapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavawapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawapnĂŒro|shavawapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawapnknĂŒro|goshavawapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawapnĂŒro|gokishavawapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawapnĂŒmu|shavawapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawapnknĂŒmu|goshavawapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawapnĂŒmu|gokishavawapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavawapshĂ«nĂŒ|shavawapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavawapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavawapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavawapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawapshĂ«ro|shavawapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawapnkshĂ«ro|goshavawapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawapshĂ«ro|gokishavawapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawapshĂ«mu|shavawapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawapnkshĂ«mu|goshavawapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawapshĂ«mu|gokishavawapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavawapronĂŒ|shavawapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavawapnkronĂŒ|goshavawapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawapronĂŒ|gokishavawapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavawaproshĂ«|shavawaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavawapnkroshĂ«|goshavawapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavawaproshĂ«|gokishavawaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawapromu|shavawapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawapnkromu|goshavawapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawapromu|gokishavawapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavawapmunĂŒ|shavawapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavawapnkmunĂŒ|goshavawapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawapmunĂŒ|gokishavawapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavawapmushĂ«|shavawapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavawapnkmushĂ«|goshavawapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavawapmushĂ«|gokishavawapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawapmuro|shavawapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawapnkmuro|goshavawapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawapmuro|gokishavawapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
